_skins_path_comment: Path to skins folder (null = ./skins next to this script)
_game_path_comment: Game install directory (null = default Steam path)
_bypass_characters_comment: Character names to never randomize (keep default palettes)
_bypass_buttons_comment: Per-character button bypasses (keep default palette for those slots)
_only_defaults_comment: If true, only replace palettes that still match game defaults
_seed_comment: Fixed random seed for reproducible results (null = random each run)
